property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\HP\OMEN-Broadcast\Common;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\qasar\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: TC01 - Verify user can add a place with valid payload
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @AddPlace @TC01 Scenario: TC01 - Verify user can add a place with valid payload # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:14 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() ✔ Given I have a valid add place request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_place_request_payload() /maps/api/place/add/json ✔ When I send a "POST" request to add place endpoint with "AddPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "addPlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "addPlaceResponse" response body should contain "status" as "add.response.status" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "addPlaceResponse" response body should contain a valid "place_id" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "addPlaceResponse" response body should contain "scope" as "add.response.scope" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC02 - Verify place is persisted correctly after adding
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @RegressionI @GetPlace @TC02 Scenario: TC02 - Verify place is persisted correctly after adding # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:26 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() ✔ Given I have a valid add place request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_place_request_payload() /maps/api/place/add/json ✔ When I send a "POST" request to add place endpoint with "AddPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "place_id" from the response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "name" as "place.name" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "address" as "place.address" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "phone_number" as "place.phone" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "website" as "place.website" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "language" as "place.language" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC03 - Verify user can update the address of an existing place
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @UpdatePlace @TC03 Scenario: TC03 - Verify user can update the address of an existing place # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:43 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() ✔ Given I have a valid add place request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_place_request_payload() /maps/api/place/add/json ✔ When I send a "POST" request to add place endpoint with "AddPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "place_id" from the response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid update place request with new address # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_update_place_request_with_new_address() /maps/api/place/update/json ✔ When I send a "PUT" request to add place endpoint with "UpdatePlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "updatePlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "updatePlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "update.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "address" as "place.updated.address" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC04 - Verify user can delete an existing place
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @DeletePlace @TC04 Scenario: TC04 - Verify user can delete an existing place # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:60 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() ✔ Given I have a valid add place request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_place_request_payload() /maps/api/place/add/json ✔ When I send a "POST" request to add place endpoint with "AddPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "place_id" from the response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid delete place request with valid stored placeId # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_delete_place_request_with_valid_stored_place_id() /maps/api/place/delete/json ✔ When I send a "DELETE" request to add place endpoint with "DeletePlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "deletePlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "deletePlaceResponse" response body should contain "status" as "add.response.status" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 404 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "invalid.place.id.get.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC05 - Verify API fails when invalid place_id is used in update request
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @UpdatePlace @TC05 Scenario: TC05 - Verify API fails when invalid place_id is used in update request # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:77 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() b3510aa6727e0179819bde5691d3e6f9 ✔ Given I have an invalid place_id # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_an_invalid_place_id() ✔ Given I have a valid update place request with new address # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_update_place_request_with_new_address() /maps/api/place/update/json ✔ When I send a "PUT" request to add place endpoint with "UpdatePlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "updatePlaceResponse" response status code should be 404 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "updatePlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "invalid.place.id.update.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC06 - Verify API fails when non-existing place_id is used in delete request
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @DeletePlace @TC06 Scenario: TC06 - Verify API fails when non-existing place_id is used in delete request # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:88 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() b3510aa6727e0179819bde5691d3e6f9 ✔ Given I have an invalid place_id # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_an_invalid_place_id() ✔ Given I have a valid delete place request with valid stored placeId # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_delete_place_request_with_valid_stored_place_id() /maps/api/place/delete/json ✔ When I send a "DELETE" request to add place endpoint with "DeletePlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "deletePlaceResponse" response status code should be 404 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "deletePlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "invalid.place.id.delete.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC07 - Verify API fails with invalid or non-existing place_id in delete request
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @GetPlace @TC07 Scenario: TC07 - Verify API fails with invalid or non-existing place_id in delete request # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:99 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() b3510aa6727e0179819bde5691d3e6f9 ✔ Given I have an invalid place_id # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_an_invalid_place_id() ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 404 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "invalid.place.id.get.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC08 - Verify complete CRUD flow works correctly end to end
testcase.system-out: @PlaceAPI @Regression @E2E @TC08 @Smoke Scenario: TC08 - Verify complete CRUD flow works correctly end to end # src/test/resources/features/PlaceAPI.feature:110 ✔ Given the Place API is up and running # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_place_api_is_up_and_running() ✔ Given I have a valid add place request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_place_request_payload() /maps/api/place/add/json ✔ When I send a "POST" request to add place endpoint with "AddPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "addPlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "addPlaceResponse" response body should contain "status" as "add.response.status" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "addPlaceResponse" response body should contain a valid "place_id" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "addPlaceResponse" response body should contain "scope" as "add.response.scope" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And I store the "place_id" from the response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "name" as "place.name" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "address" as "place.address" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "phone_number" as "place.phone" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "website" as "place.website" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "language" as "place.language" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid update place request with new address # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_update_place_request_with_new_address() /maps/api/place/update/json ✔ When I send a "PUT" request to add place endpoint with "UpdatePlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "updatePlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "updatePlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "update.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "address" as "place.updated.address" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid delete place request with valid stored placeId # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_delete_place_request_with_valid_stored_place_id() /maps/api/place/delete/json ✔ When I send a "DELETE" request to add place endpoint with "DeletePlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "deletePlaceResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "deletePlaceResponse" response body should contain "status" as "add.response.status" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Given I have a valid get place request # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_place_request() /maps/api/place/get/json ✔ When I send a "GET" request to add place endpoint with "GetPlaceAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_add_place_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) ✔ Then the "getPlaceResponse" response status code should be 404 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) ✔ And the "getPlaceResponse" response body should contain "msg" as "invalid.place.id.get.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.PlaceAPISteps.the_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)
